Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Impact Assessment Act
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Impact Assessment Act

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Impact Assessment Act in order to specify that a regulation must not set out a minimum coal production capacity limit in respect of a new coal mine that is designated a physical activity.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 109 of the Impact Assessment Act is renumbered as subsection 109(1) and is amended by adding the following:

Subsection.Text: A regulation made under subsection (1) must not set out a minimum coal production capacity limit in respect of the construction, operation, decommissioning and abandonment of a new coal mine that is designated a physical activity under paragraph (1)(b).
